REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (170 Byxbee Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Dec-07-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Suane Thompson, Esq. for and with Petitioner Robert Gipson. No other appearances.

There being no over bid over the sale price of $458,000.00. The court confirmed the sale of the subject real property located at 170 Byxbee St., San Francisco, signing an order in open court. Bond is set at $10,000.00 balance to be placed into a blocked account. Status hearing is set for Jan. 25, 2011 @ 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 for filing of the receipt of funds into blocked account.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-20-2010 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-16-2010 Continued To Apr-06-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-23-2010 Continued To Mar-16-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Suanne Thompson for Robert Gipson.

This was a pre-granted matter. Ms. Thompson appeared stating that Mr. Gipson does not qualify for a bond, that she received the accounting from the Conservator, that there were no cash assets coming into the Estate and that the only asset was the house. In addition, Ms. Thompson asked if Mr. Gipson could serve without independent administration authority/powers. The Court explained that posting of bond is required and stated that an amended petition would be required for him to serve without authority. The matter was continued to March 16, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
